sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 텍사스 인스트루먼트는 3분기 매출 47억 4,000만 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 14% 성장했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 3분기 매출은 47억 4,000만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 14%, 전 분기 대비 7% 증가하며 모든 최종 시장에서 성장을 기록했습니다.
지난 12개월 동안 66억 달러를 주주에게 환원했으며, 300mm 생산 시설의 이점을 통해 69억 달러의 영업 현금흐름을 창출했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 300mm 생산 시설에 대한 지속적인 투자를 통해 운영 효율성과 현금 창출 능력을 강화하고 있습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 지난 12개월간 자본 지출은 48억 달러, 연구개발 및 판매관리비(R&D 및 SG&A)에는 39억 달러를 투자했습니다.

watchItems.text: 4분기 가이던스에서 제시된 주당 순이익 범위와 실제 실적 간의 차이를 유발하는 비용 요인들을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99 2 q32025txnex99-eredgarversi.htm EX-99 Document Exhibit 99 TI reports third quarter 2025 financial results and shareholder returns Conference call at 3:30 p.m. Central time today on ti.com/ir DALLAS (Oct. 21, 2025) – Texas Instruments Incorporated (TI) (Nasdaq: TXN) today reported third quarter revenue of $4.74 billion, net income of $1.36 billion and earnings per share of $1.48. Earnings per share included a 10-cent reduction that was not in the company's original guidance. Regarding the company's performance and returns to shareholders, Haviv Ilan, TI's president and CEO, made the following comments: • "Revenue increased 7% sequentially and 14% from the same quarter a year ago with growth across all end markets. • "Our cash flow from operations of $6.9 billion for the trailing 12 months again underscored   Normalized numeric aliases: $4.74 billion = 47억 4,000만 달러; $1.36 billion = 13억 6,000만 달러; $6.9 billion = 69억 달러; $4.74 = 4.74달러; $1.36 = 1.36달러; $1.48 = 1.48달러; $6.9 = 6.9달러.

the benefit of 300mm production. Free cash flow for the same period was $2.4 billion. • "Over the past 12 months we invested $3.9 billion in R&D and SG&A, invested $4.8 billion in capital expenditures and returned $6.6 billion to owners. • "TI's fourth quarter outlook is for revenue in the range of $4.22 billion to $4.58 billion and earnings per share between $1.13 and $1.39." 1 Free cash flow, a non-GAAP financial measure, is cash flow from operations less capital expenditures, plus proceeds from U.S. CHIPS and Science Act (CHIP  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.4 billion = 24억 달러; $3.9 billion = 39억 달러; $4.8 billion = 48억 달러; $6.6 billion = 66억 달러; $4.22 billion = 42억 2,000만 달러; $4.58 billion = 45억 8,000만 달러; $2.4 = 2.4달러; $3.9 = 3.9달러; $6.6 = 6.6달러; $4,742 = 4,742달러; $1,362 = 1,362달러; $6,244 = 6,244달러; 1,364 million = 13억 6,400만 달러; 1,554 million = 15억 5,400만 달러; 1,362 million = 13억 6,200만 달러; 2,190 million = 21억 9,000만 달러; 6,897 million = 68억 9,700만 달러; 6,244 million = 62억 4,400만 달러.
